last_task.subject: Resolve fleet escalation: iris blocked on task #277 — Genuine human escalation: whoabuddy must create a GitHub PAT (repo scope) for forge0btc. No agent can perform this. Steps after PAT creation: 1) On Forge (192.168.1.15): arc creds set --service github --key token --value <PAT>, 2) echo <PAT> | gh auth login --with-token, 3) Retry push fix/erc8004-transfer-post-condition branch and open PR on aibtcdev/skills.
